name: ai-context-engineering-for-frontend
description: AI-driven context engineering skills for Vue 3 / React 18 projects

skills.name: component-gen
skills.description: Generate production-ready SPA component (React or Vue) with all 4 async states

skills.name: component-gen-next
skills.description: Generate Next.js App Router component with RSC, Suspense, Server Actions

skills.name: api-bind
skills.description: OpenAPI / Protobuf spec to typed client + TanStack Query hook

skills.name: api-mocks
skills.description: Generate MSW v2 handlers + typed fixtures from OpenAPI spec or /api-bind output

skills.name: component-tests
skills.description: Vitest + Testing Library tests + a11y audit

skills.name: e2e-tests
skills.description: Playwright E2E tests for critical user journeys

skills.name: fe-repo-scout
skills.description: Deep analysis of existing frontend repository

skills.name: be-repo-scout
skills.description: Excavate API contracts from backend repository

skills.name: frontend-code-review
skills.description: Review PR/diff for security, architecture, anti-patterns

skills.name: pr
skills.description: Create PR with conventional commit title

skills.name: setup-configs
skills.description: Generate tsconfig, vite.config, biome.json

skills.name: refactor
skills.description: Code transforms: class-to-hooks, options-to-composition, cjs-to-esm, tanstack-v4-to-v5

skills.name: web-vitals
skills.description: Core Web Vitals + performance budget audit

skills.name: browser-check
skills.description: AI self-verification of running UI via agent-browser

skills.name: react-doctor
skills.description: React health check - 0-100 score + diagnostics

skills.name: vue-doctor
skills.description: Vue 3 health check - 0-100 score via Oxlint + eslint-plugin-vue + vue-tsc

skills.name: ui-tweak
skills.description: Process visual annotations to targeted code fixes

skills.name: spec-audit
skills.description: Deep QA audit of UI/UX specification

skills.name: init-project
skills.description: Generate CLAUDE.md for your project

skills.name: init-agent
skills.description: Generate frontend_agent.md for AI onboarding

skills.name: init-skill
skills.description: Create or improve a skill interactively

skills.name: fix-markdown
skills.description: Fix all markdownlint errors in .md files

skills.name: skill-audit
skills.description: Audit SKILL.md for bloat and harmful patterns

skills.name: update-ai-setup
skills.description: Sync docs/ai-setup.md Registry

skills.name: agents-checker
skills.description: Verify .claude/agents/ structural integrity

skills.name: curate-lessons
skills.description: Deduplicate + graduate .ai-lessons/ into context files
